summary: Commerce MCP Studio 0.2.12: manual project key entry when .env has client credentials only.
highlights: Enter commercetools project key in the panel when .env has client ID/secret but no PROJECT_KEY
Supports COMM_TOOLS_*_STG suffixed credentials with optional project key in .env
Manual project key is saved per environment (STG, DEV, …)

introduced: Project key field appears under Environment when client credentials are probed from .env without a project key
changed: COMM_TOOLS_PROJECT_KEY and suffixed admin client variables are recognized from workspace .env
